title: 3-Pack 18 L Plastic Square Collapsible Crates, 28 X 28 X 27 cm Cube Storage Boxes, Foldable Plastic Storage Basket, Black
features: Our square milk crate, made of high-quality plastic that is lightweight and strong, designed with reliable structure, is able to withstand daily use with long-term durability

Foldable and stackable features make daily use of the box more convenient, unfolded up with just few steps, when no need, it can be folded easily and be placed in narrow place or car trunk without taking up much room, stackable design fully utilizes vertical space, which plays a good role in chest freezer organisation

Size of 28.3 x 28.3 x 27.4 cm, cube shape perfectly fitting to cube storage units, it is more durable and less easy to deform than fabric storage cube, and the ventilated holes makes it breathable, and it is easy to see what is stored
Cut-out handle provides comfortable grasping handy carrying
Ideal for shelf, closet, counter top, storage unit, car trunk and more, good for storing fruits and vegetable, bottle milk, snacks, books, tools, daily sundries etc.
description: Xowine 3-Pack 18 L Plastic Square Collapsible Crates, 28 X 28 X 27 cm Cube Storage Boxes, Foldable Plastic Storage Basket, Black
